description_en: Inconsistent contact, no swing structure, ball direction unpredictable
description_id: Kontak tidak konsisten, tidak ada struktur ayunan, arah bola tak terduga

description_en: Repeatable swing on fed balls, struggles with depth and timing in rallies
description_id: Ayunan bisa diulang pada bola umpan, kesulitan kedalaman dan timing saat rally

description_en: Reliable cross-court and down-the-line in steady rallies, moderate topspin
description_id: Andal silang dan lurus pada rally stabil, topspin sedang

description_en: Heavy topspin, controls depth and angle under pace, can hit on the run
description_id: Topspin berat, mengontrol kedalaman dan sudut di bawah tekanan, bisa pukul sambil lari

description_en: Weapon — dictates points, redirects pace, finishes from any court position
description_id: Senjata — mengatur poin, mengubah tempo, menyelesaikan dari posisi mana pun

description_en: Late preparation, weak contact, frequently mis-hits
description_id: Persiapan terlambat, kontak lemah, sering salah pukul

description_en: Stable on fed balls, breaks down under pace or wide balls
description_id: Stabil pada bola umpan, runtuh saat ditekan tempo atau bola lebar

description_en: Consistent in rallies, can change direction, manages medium pace
description_id: Konsisten saat rally, bisa ubah arah, mengelola tempo sedang

description_en: Solid under pressure, drives with depth and topspin, handles high balls
description_id: Kokoh di bawah tekanan, memukul dalam dengan topspin, mengatasi bola tinggi

description_en: Reliable second weapon — attacks short balls, redirects, no exploitable weakness
description_id: Senjata kedua yang andal — menyerang bola pendek, mengubah arah, tanpa kelemahan

description_en: Chops at the ball, no underspin control, sits up short
description_id: Memotong bola, tanpa kontrol underspin, bola naik dan pendek

description_en: Some underspin on fed balls, inconsistent depth and float
description_id: Ada underspin pada bola umpan, kedalaman dan laju tidak konsisten

description_en: Functional defensive slice, keeps it low in neutral rallies
description_id: Slice bertahan fungsional, menjaga bola rendah pada rally netral

description_en: Controls depth and stays low, uses it to approach and change rhythm
description_id: Mengontrol kedalaman dan tetap rendah, dipakai untuk approach dan ubah ritme

description_en: Precise — knifes low, disguises, transitions and neutralizes pace at will
description_id: Presisi — menusuk rendah, menyamarkan, transisi dan menetralkan tempo sesuka hati

description_en: Unstable face, ball floats or nets, no consistent underspin
description_id: Permukaan raket tidak stabil, bola melayang atau nyangkut, underspin tak konsisten

description_en: Blocks fed balls back, depth and height vary widely
description_id: Memblok bola umpan kembali, kedalaman dan ketinggian sangat bervariasi

description_en: Reliable chip return and rally slice, stays reasonably low
description_id: Chip return dan slice rally yang andal, cukup rendah

description_en: Penetrating low slice, controls depth, effective approach and defense
description_id: Slice rendah menusuk, mengontrol kedalaman, efektif untuk approach dan bertahan

description_en: Go-to shot — bites low, varies pace, sets up the point off both wings
description_id: Pukulan andalan — menggigit rendah, variasi tempo, menyiapkan poin dari kedua sisi

description_en: Swings at volleys, late, struggles to make clean contact
description_id: Mengayun saat voli, terlambat, sulit kontak bersih

description_en: Punch on fed balls, breaks down on low or fast balls
description_id: Memukul pendek pada bola umpan, runtuh pada bola rendah atau cepat

description_en: Compact block, controls direction on medium-pace balls
description_id: Blok ringkas, mengontrol arah pada bola tempo sedang

description_en: Firm punch with depth, handles low balls, volleys with intent
description_id: Pukulan tegas dan dalam, mengatasi bola rendah, voli dengan tujuan

description_en: Crisp and angled, finishes points, half-step volleys under pressure
description_id: Tajam dan menyudut, menyelesaikan poin, voli setengah langkah di bawah tekanan

description_en: Weak grip and frame, no control, ball sits up
description_id: Pegangan dan bingkai lemah, tanpa kontrol, bola naik

description_en: Blocks fed balls, unstable on pace or low contact
description_id: Memblok bola umpan, tidak stabil pada tempo atau kontak rendah

description_en: Compact and steady on medium balls, controls direction
description_id: Ringkas dan stabil pada bola sedang, mengontrol arah

description_en: Firm with depth and angle, handles low and fast balls
description_id: Tegas dengan kedalaman dan sudut, mengatasi bola rendah dan cepat

description_en: Sharp, disguised, finishes and defends the net with equal ease
description_id: Tajam, tersamar, menyelesaikan dan bertahan di net dengan mudah

description_en: Cannot time the pickup, ball nets or pops up
description_id: Tidak bisa timing pickup, bola nyangkut atau melambung

description_en: Occasional clean pickup, very inconsistent in transition
description_id: Sesekali pickup bersih, sangat tidak konsisten saat transisi

description_en: Manages the half-volley in the transition zone with soft hands
description_id: Mengelola half-volley di zona transisi dengan tangan lembut

description_en: Reliable pickup under pressure, controls depth coming forward
description_id: Pickup andal di bawah tekanan, mengontrol kedalaman saat maju

description_en: Effortless — absorbs pace, redirects low pickups, never rushed in transition
description_id: Mulus — menyerap tempo, mengarahkan pickup rendah, tak pernah terburu saat transisi

description_en: No throwing motion, double-faults often, no rhythm
description_id: Tidak ada gerakan lempar, sering double-fault, tanpa ritme

description_en: Gets first serve in slowly, inconsistent toss and contact point
description_id: Servis pertama masuk pelan, lambungan dan titik kontak tak konsisten

description_en: Reliable first serve with moderate pace, hits to a side
description_id: Servis pertama andal dengan tempo sedang, bisa arahkan ke satu sisi

description_en: Good pace and placement, hits all three locations (wide/body/T)
description_id: Tempo dan penempatan bagus, bisa ketiga lokasi (lebar/badan/T)

description_en: Free points — heavy pace, pinpoint placement, holds easily under pressure
description_id: Poin gratis — tempo berat, penempatan presisi, mudah menahan game di bawah tekanan

description_en: No spin imparted, second serve is just a soft flat ball
description_id: Tidak ada spin, servis kedua hanya bola flat pelan

description_en: Some kick or slice but unreliable, still double-faults under pressure
description_id: Ada kick atau slice tapi tak andal, masih double-fault saat ditekan

description_en: Dependable second serve with margin, consistent spin and placement
description_id: Servis kedua andal dengan margin, spin dan penempatan konsisten

description_en: Heavy kick or biting slice, varies placement, rarely double-faults
description_id: Kick berat atau slice menggigit, variasi penempatan, jarang double-fault

description_en: Aggressive second serve — kicks high or slices wide, weaponized on big points
description_id: Servis kedua agresif — kick tinggi atau slice lebar, jadi senjata di poin penting

description_en: Mistimes the serve, frames returns, no plan
description_id: Salah timing servis, frame return, tanpa rencana

description_en: Blocks first serves back occasionally, attacks second serve weakly
description_id: Sesekali memblok servis pertama, menyerang servis kedua lemah

description_en: Gets most returns in play, neutral depth, splits first and second tactics
description_id: Sebagian besar return masuk, kedalaman netral, beda taktik servis 1 dan 2

description_en: Aggressive on second serve, blocks first serve deep, varies placement
description_id: Agresif pada servis kedua, blok servis pertama dalam, variasi penempatan

description_en: Return is an offensive weapon — steps in, takes time away, returns big serves deep
description_id: Return jadi senjata menyerang — melangkah masuk, mencuri waktu, return servis besar dalam

description_en: Misjudges the lob, frames or misses the overhead entirely
description_id: Salah baca lob, frame atau gagal total pada overhead

description_en: Makes contact on easy lobs, inconsistent power and direction
description_id: Kontak pada lob mudah, daya dan arah tidak konsisten

description_en: Puts away comfortable overheads, manages footwork on most lobs
description_id: Mematikan overhead nyaman, mengelola footwork pada sebagian besar lob

description_en: Reliable under deep lobs, scissor-kick when needed, places the smash
description_id: Andal pada lob dalam, scissor-kick bila perlu, menempatkan smash

description_en: Finishes any lob — explosive, accurate, hits backhand overheads when forced
description_id: Menyelesaikan lob apa pun — eksplosif, akurat, smash backhand saat terpaksa

description_en: No touch — lobs land short or sail long, no control
description_id: Tanpa sentuhan — lob jatuh pendek atau melayang keluar, tanpa kontrol

description_en: Defensive lob sometimes resets the point, height and depth vary
description_id: Lob bertahan kadang mereset poin, ketinggian dan kedalaman bervariasi

description_en: Functional defensive lob, occasional topspin lob attempt
description_id: Lob bertahan fungsional, sesekali mencoba topspin lob

description_en: Controls defensive lob depth, offensive topspin lob clears reliably
description_id: Mengontrol kedalaman lob bertahan, topspin lob menyerang melewati lawan andal

description_en: Both lobs are weapons — disguised topspin lob and pinpoint defensive reset
description_id: Kedua lob jadi senjata — topspin lob tersamar dan reset bertahan presisi

description_en: No feel, drop shot sits up or nets, telegraphed
description_id: Tanpa feeling, drop shot naik atau nyangkut, mudah terbaca

description_en: Occasional good drop, mostly poor disguise and depth
description_id: Sesekali drop bagus, sebagian besar penyamaran dan kedalaman buruk

description_en: Functional drop off short balls, decent disguise in neutral
description_id: Drop fungsional pada bola pendek, penyamaran lumayan saat netral

description_en: Soft, low-bouncing drop with disguise off both wings
description_id: Drop lembut, pantulan rendah, tersamar dari kedua sisi

description_en: Lethal touch — drops with backspin off any ball, disguised until the last moment
description_id: Sentuhan mematikan — drop dengan backspin dari bola apa pun, tersamar sampai detik akhir

description_en: Approaches off any ball, no setup, gets passed easily
description_id: Approach dari bola apa pun, tanpa setup, mudah dilewati

description_en: Recognizes some short balls, weak approach gives up net position
description_id: Mengenali sebagian bola pendek, approach lemah menyerahkan posisi net

description_en: Approaches off the right ball, keeps it deep, follows in
description_id: Approach dari bola tepat, menjaga kedalaman, mengikuti maju

description_en: Penetrating approach to a corner, splits well, controls the net entry
description_id: Approach menusuk ke sudut, split baik, mengontrol masuk ke net

description_en: Surgical approach — slice or drive deep, takes time away, near-impossible to pass
description_id: Approach bedah — slice atau drive dalam, mencuri waktu, hampir mustahil dilewati

description_en: Serves with no target, same ball every time
description_id: Servis tanpa target, bola sama setiap kali

description_en: Aims for a side occasionally, no follow-up plan
description_id: Sesekali mengarah ke satu sisi, tanpa rencana lanjutan

description_en: Hits to chosen locations, beginning to use serve+1 on the forehand
description_id: Servis ke lokasi pilihan, mulai pakai serve+1 ke forehand

description_en: Sets up the next ball deliberately, varies wide/body/T by situation
description_id: Menyiapkan bola berikut secara sengaja, variasi lebar/badan/T sesuai situasi

description_en: Plays the score — serve patterns by opponent and pressure, serve+1 is automatic
description_id: Bermain sesuai skor — pola servis menurut lawan dan tekanan, serve+1 otomatis

description_en: No return position or intent, reacts blindly
description_id: Tanpa posisi atau niat return, bereaksi asal

description_en: Stands in one spot, same return regardless of serve
description_id: Berdiri di satu titik, return sama tanpa lihat servis

description_en: Adjusts position for first vs second serve, has a basic target
description_id: Menyesuaikan posisi servis 1 vs 2, punya target dasar

description_en: Return-and-attack on second serve, neutralizes first serve deep
description_id: Return-and-attack pada servis kedua, menetralkan servis pertama dalam

description_en: Reads the toss, varies position and target, breaks serve with clear patterns
description_id: Membaca lambungan, variasi posisi dan target, mematahkan servis dengan pola jelas

description_en: Hits randomly, no rally direction or shape
description_id: Memukul acak, tanpa arah atau bentuk rally

description_en: Keeps the ball in cross-court but loses depth under pressure
description_id: Menjaga bola silang tapi kehilangan kedalaman saat ditekan

description_en: Sustains cross-court rhythm, changes direction at the right time
description_id: Mempertahankan ritme silang, ubah arah pada saat tepat

description_en: Controls depth and height, opens the court, hurts the short ball
description_id: Mengontrol kedalaman dan ketinggian, membuka lapangan, menghukum bola pendek

description_en: Constructs points — moves the opponent, changes pace and shape, dictates baseline
description_id: Membangun poin — menggerakkan lawan, ubah tempo dan bentuk, mengatur baseline

description_en: Avoids the net, no positioning when there
description_id: Menghindari net, tanpa posisi saat di sana

description_en: Comes in occasionally, poor first-volley position, gets passed
description_id: Sesekali maju, posisi voli pertama buruk, mudah dilewati

description_en: Closes behind a decent approach, covers most passes and lobs
description_id: Menutup di belakang approach lumayan, menutup sebagian besar passing dan lob

description_en: Good net coverage, anticipates the pass, finishes the first chance
description_id: Cakupan net bagus, mengantisipasi passing, menyelesaikan peluang pertama

description_en: Owns the net — splits, closes angles, finishes early, rarely beaten
description_id: Menguasai net — split, menutup sudut, menyelesaikan lebih awal, jarang dikalahkan

description_en: Gives up on tough balls, no defensive shape
description_id: Menyerah pada bola sulit, tanpa bentuk bertahan

description_en: Gets some balls back but with no depth or purpose
description_id: Mengembalikan sebagian bola tapi tanpa kedalaman atau tujuan

description_en: Resets with a lob or deep ball, neutralizes some pressure
description_id: Mereset dengan lob atau bola dalam, menetralkan sebagian tekanan

description_en: Defends actively — lobs, slices deep, turns defense into neutral
description_id: Bertahan aktif — lob, slice dalam, mengubah bertahan jadi netral

description_en: Elite defense — scrambles, resets, counterpunches, turns defense into offense
description_id: Pertahanan elit — berlari, reset, counter, mengubah bertahan jadi menyerang

description_en: Unaware of partner or formation, stands flat-footed
description_id: Tidak sadar pasangan atau formasi, berdiri kaku

description_en: Knows basic up-and-back, no poaching or movement
description_id: Tahu dasar depan-belakang, tanpa poaching atau pergerakan

description_en: Moves with partner, poaches the obvious ball, covers own side
description_id: Bergerak bersama pasangan, poaching bola jelas, menutup sisinya

description_en: Uses I-formation/Australian, poaches actively, communicates well
description_id: Pakai I-formation/Australian, poaching aktif, komunikasi baik

description_en: Orchestrates doubles — formations, fakes, switches, controls net as a unit
description_id: Mengatur ganda — formasi, gertakan, switch, menguasai net sebagai satu tim

description_en: Reacts only after the ball is hit, no anticipation
description_id: Bereaksi baru setelah bola dipukul, tanpa antisipasi

description_en: Occasionally guesses right, mostly caught off-balance
description_id: Sesekali menebak benar, sebagian besar tertangkap tidak seimbang

description_en: Reads obvious cues (open stance, contact point), starts moving early
description_id: Membaca petunjuk jelas (kuda-kuda terbuka, titik kontak), mulai bergerak lebih awal

description_en: Anticipates direction from setup and position, rarely wrong-footed
description_id: Mengantisipasi arah dari setup dan posisi, jarang salah langkah

description_en: Reads the game two shots ahead — patterns, body language, court geometry
description_id: Membaca permainan dua pukulan ke depan — pola, bahasa tubuh, geometri lapangan

description_en: Flat-footed, reaches for balls, poor recovery
description_id: Kaki kaku, menjangkau bola, recovery buruk

description_en: Moves to easy balls, slow recovery, crosses feet inefficiently
description_id: Bergerak ke bola mudah, recovery lambat, langkah menyilang tidak efisien

description_en: Side-shuffles and recovers on most balls, adequate court coverage
description_id: Side-shuffle dan recovery pada sebagian besar bola, cakupan lapangan memadai

description_en: Efficient first step, recovers to optimal position, covers the court well
description_id: Langkah pertama efisien, recovery ke posisi optimal, cakupan lapangan baik

description_en: Elite movement — explosive first step, balanced on the stretch, always recovered
description_id: Pergerakan elit — langkah pertama eksplosif, seimbang saat meregang, selalu recovery

description_en: No split step, stands still as opponent hits
description_id: Tanpa split step, diam saat lawan memukul

description_en: Splits late or inconsistently, often caught flat
description_id: Split terlambat atau tidak konsisten, sering tertangkap kaku

description_en: Splits on most balls, timing roughly matches opponent contact
description_id: Split pada sebagian besar bola, timing kira-kira sesuai kontak lawan

description_en: Split timed to opponent contact, loads and pushes off cleanly
description_id: Split timing sesuai kontak lawan, memuat dan mendorong bersih

description_en: Perfect split timing — lands as the ball is struck, explodes in any direction
description_id: Timing split sempurna — mendarat saat bola dipukul, meledak ke segala arah

description_en: Tires within a few games, quality drops sharply
description_id: Lelah dalam beberapa game, kualitas turun tajam

description_en: Holds up one set, noticeable decline after
description_id: Bertahan satu set, penurunan terasa setelahnya

description_en: Maintains quality through two sets in most matches
description_id: Mempertahankan kualitas hingga dua set di sebagian besar pertandingan

description_en: Strong across three sets, recovers between points and games
description_id: Kuat sepanjang tiga set, pulih antar poin dan game

description_en: Relentless — same intensity in the third set, recovery is a weapon
description_id: Tanpa henti — intensitas sama di set ketiga, recovery jadi senjata

description_en: Little pace on serve or groundstrokes, no explosiveness
description_id: Tempo servis dan groundstroke kecil, tanpa eksplosivitas

description_en: Some pace on setup balls, cannot generate under pressure
description_id: Ada tempo pada bola setup, tak bisa hasilkan saat ditekan

description_en: Functional power on serve and groundstrokes from balanced positions
description_id: Power fungsional pada servis dan groundstroke dari posisi seimbang

description_en: Generates pace from defense and offense, explosive first step
description_id: Menghasilkan tempo dari bertahan dan menyerang, langkah pertama eksplosif

description_en: Elite power — heavy serve, pace on the run, explosive in every direction
description_id: Power elit — servis berat, tempo sambil lari, eksplosif ke segala arah

description_en: Easily distracted, loses concentration between points
description_id: Mudah terganggu, hilang konsentrasi antar poin

description_en: Focuses in patches, drifts after errors or long rallies
description_id: Fokus sepotong-sepotong, melayang setelah kesalahan atau rally panjang

description_en: Holds focus through most games, recovers attention with routines
description_id: Menjaga fokus sepanjang sebagian besar game, memulihkan perhatian dengan rutinitas

description_en: Stays present point-to-point, strong between-point routines
description_id: Tetap hadir poin demi poin, rutinitas antar poin kuat

description_en: Locked in for whole matches — no lapses, routines are automatic under fatigue
description_id: Terkunci sepanjang pertandingan — tanpa lengah, rutinitas otomatis saat lelah

description_en: Falls apart on break points, visible frustration
description_id: Runtuh pada break point, frustrasi terlihat jelas

description_en: Tightens up in big moments, errors spike under pressure
description_id: Tegang di momen penting, kesalahan melonjak saat ditekan

description_en: Holds reasonable composure, occasional wobble on key points
description_id: Menjaga ketenangan cukup baik, sesekali goyah pada poin kunci

description_en: Calm on break points and tiebreaks, plays the big points well
description_id: Tenang pada break point dan tiebreak, bermain baik di poin penting

description_en: Thrives under pressure — clutch on deciding points, composure never cracks
description_id: Berkembang di bawah tekanan — tajam di poin penentu, ketenangan tak pernah retak

description_en: Hesitates or panics, wrong shot at the wrong time
description_id: Ragu atau panik, pukulan salah di saat salah

description_en: Decides slowly, often commits to the low-percentage shot
description_id: Memutuskan lambat, sering memilih pukulan persentase rendah

description_en: Makes reasonable choices in neutral, slows down under pressure
description_id: Membuat pilihan wajar saat netral, melambat saat ditekan

description_en: Quick, high-percentage decisions, adapts shot selection mid-rally
description_id: Keputusan cepat dan persentase tinggi, menyesuaikan pilihan pukulan saat rally

description_en: Instant optimal choices — reads the situation and picks the right shot every time
description_id: Pilihan optimal seketika — membaca situasi dan memilih pukulan tepat setiap kali

description_en: Spirals after errors, body language collapses
description_id: Terpuruk setelah kesalahan, bahasa tubuh runtuh

description_en: Carries errors into the next point, slow to reset
description_id: Membawa kesalahan ke poin berikut, lambat reset

description_en: Resets after most errors, body language stays neutral
description_id: Reset setelah sebagian besar kesalahan, bahasa tubuh tetap netral

description_en: Bounces back quickly, uses errors as information, stays constructive
description_id: Bangkit cepat, memakai kesalahan sebagai informasi, tetap konstruktif

description_en: Unshakeable — errors don't linger, raises level after setbacks, leads body language
description_id: Tak tergoyahkan — kesalahan tak berlama, menaikkan level setelah kemunduran, memimpin bahasa tubuh
